args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

Thank you for attending the client meeting on May 5, 2024. Here is a summary of what was discussed:

**Attendees:**
- Emma Johnson (Blue Sparrow Tech)
- David Lee (Blue Sparrow Tech)
- John Mitchell (Client)

**Meeting Overview:**
- Discussed the requirements for the new project.
- Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones.
- Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your valuable feedback.

**Action Items:**
- Emma will update the project plan based on your feedback.
- David will coordinate with the development team to begin the initial phase.

**Next Meeting:** The next meeting is scheduled for **2024-06-01**.

The full meeting minutes document is attached for your reference. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
